entries.scenario: Appended a reference to an undefined variable '__THIS_DOES_NOT_EXIST__'. Expected: NameError.
entries.error_message: pip install exceeded the 120 s sandbox limit.
entries.root_cause: Execution exceeded the configured sandbox time limit — likely an infinite loop or blocking I/O.
entries.short_fix: Refactor loops to guarantee termination, or add an explicit iteration cap.
